sections.subtitle: Document observations, hazards, controls, or corrective actions.

sections.title: Crane Suspended Work Platform Permit and JHA
sections.html:
PART 1: WORK AUTHORIZATION PERMIT

Permit Number: [DATE]-[MISH21]-[SEQ]

Pre-work Conditions Checklist:

☐ Trial lift performed and documented

☐ Proof testing of platform completed

sections.title: Crane Suspended Work Platform Permit and JHA (continued 2)
sections.html:
☐ Crane set up on firm, level footing

☐ Outriggers fully extended and blocked

☐ Wind speed verified within safe limits (<20 mph)

☐ Load capacity verified (platform + personnel + tools < 50% of crane capacity)

☐ Anti-two-block device operational

sections.title: Crane Suspended Work Platform Permit and JHA (continued 3)
sections.html:
☐ Controlled load lowering capability verified

☐ Positive locking hooks on all rigging

☐ Communication system established between operator and platform

☐ Fall protection systems inspected and ready

☐ Pre-lift meeting conducted with all involved personnel

sections.title: Crane Suspended Work Platform Permit and JHA (continued 4)
sections.html:
Work Authorization:

Work Description

Location

Start Time

End Time

Authorized By

Required Controls Checklist:

☐ Personal Fall Arrest Systems (PFAS) required for all occupants

☐ Lanyards attached to designated anchor points only

sections.title: Crane Suspended Work Platform Permit and JHA (continued 5)
sections.html:
☐ Hard hats with chin straps required

☐ Tools and materials secured from falling

☐ Barricades erected below lift area

☐ Tag lines used to control platform

sections.title: Crane Suspended Work Platform Permit and JHA Sign-Off
